description: Bottled in a delectable blue flask, Cool Waters for men from davidoff is a clean and invigorating fragrance. A fragrance that opens with notes of lavender, menthe, iris and musk and mellows down to a fresh, clean scent that is perfect for a night out on the town.Quantity: 75 mlCautionFlammableKeep away from sources of ignitionKeep away from childrenDo not use near fire, flame or heatAvoid spraying near the eyes
